results.title: Car Insurance Prices Went Down In June—Here’s How To Lower Your Premium Even More
results.description: June saw a price drop that can ease some pressure on drivers’ wallets, with car insurance costs declining 2% after already dropping 1.7% in May, according to the U.S. Bureau of Labor Statistics’ June consumer price index. With auto insurance costs winding down steadily, it could be a good time to shop around for new rates.
